refresh_policy.title: Dashboard Data Freshness
refresh_policy.next_action: Keep the PAPER safe monitor running. If this page turns stale, rerun PAPER before trusting dashboard values.

refresh_policy.title: Dashboard Data Freshness
refresh_policy.next_action: Keep the PAPER safe monitor running. If this page turns stale, rerun PAPER before trusting dashboard values.

hidden_defects.condition: HTML remains open after source TTL while the previous generation still says PASS
hidden_defects.impact: operator may trust old portfolio or heartbeat values
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open dashboard and stop refreshing monitor artifacts for more than 300 seconds
hidden_defects.fix: client stale guard plus 10 second local file reload

hidden_defects.condition: schema requires dashboard_refresh_policy but old runtime dashboard_shell.json remains on disk
hidden_defects.impact: runtime schema validation fails and dashboard artifacts are stale
hidden_defects.reproducibility: run runtime_schema_instance_validator before regenerating runtime artifacts
hidden_defects.fix: regenerate scoped runtime dashboard artifacts after schema patch

hidden_defects.condition: first-screen live readiness chips render long internal field names on a narrow dashboard viewport
hidden_defects.impact: operator may struggle to read live readiness and scale-up blockers quickly
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open the dashboard in a narrow in-app browser pane and inspect the live readiness card
hidden_defects.fix: display compact false chips while preserving exact flag names in title and aria labels

hidden_defects.condition: operation status card uses a two-column layout that can squeeze body copy and status metrics into the same visual area
hidden_defects.impact: operator may misread whether the program is running safely
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open the dashboard in a narrow in-app browser pane and inspect the System Status card
hidden_defects.fix: render operation copy as a single-column section and move heartbeat/engine/live-order metrics into a full-width grid below

hidden_defects.condition: dashboard cards use inconsistent line-height, label spacing, and card-item alignment rules
hidden_defects.impact: operator has to scan uneven rows and columns before finding portfolio, operation, or live-readiness facts
hidden_defects.reproducibility: inspect first-screen cards and expanded detail panels across narrow and desktop widths
hidden_defects.fix: add shared typography, card grid, label/value alignment, header alignment, and table vertical alignment rules

hidden_defects.condition: local dashboard reloads while the operator has expanded detailed status, source artifact, or validator log drawers
hidden_defects.impact: operator loses expanded reading context during freshness refresh and must reopen each drawer repeatedly
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open any dashboard details drawer, wait for the 10 second dashboard reload, and observe the drawer closing
hidden_defects.fix: initialize drawer persistence after DOMContentLoaded and persist every details element open state in browser localStorage

hidden_defects.condition: portfolio snapshot renders too many equal-weight metric cards in the first screen, especially in a narrow dashboard pane
hidden_defects.impact: operator must scroll through secondary ledger details before seeing program status and live readiness
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open the dashboard in a narrow in-app browser pane and inspect the Real-Time Portfolio card
hidden_defects.fix: show only cash, equity, total PnL, and return as primary KPI cards; move locked cash, realized PnL, unrealized PnL, positions, and candidates into compact rows plus the detailed drawer

hidden_defects.condition: detailed maturity, dependency, evidence, workflow, and stability grids allow too many narrow columns while long status pills use no robust wrapping rule
hidden_defects.impact: operator sees cramped cards, clipped long status codes, and uneven scanning in lower dashboard sections
hidden_defects.reproducibility: open the detailed drawer on a wide dashboard and inspect the maturity gap component grid
hidden_defects.fix: increase detailed-card minimum widths, widen grid gaps, and make status pills wrap safely except compact readiness chips
